author: tardigrde
description: Privacy-first agentic AI chat in the sidebar. The agent reads, searches, and edits your vault through visible tool calls, routed to zero-data-retention providers by default, or runs fully local with Ollama. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: tardigrde
manifest.description: Privacy-first agentic AI chat in the sidebar. The agent reads, searches, and edits your vault through visible tool calls, routed to zero-data-retention providers by default, or runs fully local with Ollama.
manifest.name: Agentic Chat
